metadata.tagline: Skin care complements a healthy lifestyle
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: (Warm smile, genuine compliment) "Hi! I hope this isn't too random, but you have gorgeous skin — whatever you're doing is working! I'm [Your Name]. I actually work with a product called Lumi that supports skin appearance and a radiant complexion from the inside out, completely drug-free. What's your current approach to taking care of your skin?"

"Hey [Friend's Name]! Okay so you know how we've talked about wanting that natural glow without piling on a million products? I started using this patch called Lumi, and people have been asking me what I changed in my routine. It supports skin appearance and radiance using vibrotactile technology — no creams, no pills. Have you ever tried an inside-out approach to beauty like that?"

"Hey [Name]! I love your skincare content — you clearly take such great care of yourself. I've been using a product called Lumi that supports a radiant complexion and healthy skin appearance from within, totally drug-free. It's been an amazing addition to my routine. Would you be open to hearing more about how it works?"

"Hi [Prospect Name], I'm [Your Name]. [Referrer's Name] mentioned you're really into natural beauty and taking care of your skin the right way. I work with a product called Lumi that supports skin appearance and a radiant complexion using drug-free vibrotactile technology — it works from the inside out. Would you be interested in learning how it complements a healthy skincare routine?"

"Love this event! Can I just say, your skin looks amazing. (Listen and respond genuinely.) I actually help people support their natural glow with a product called Lumi — it's a drug-free patch that promotes radiant skin from the inside out. Have you ever explored beauty solutions that go beyond topical products?"

2b_rapport_story.title: 🫂 BUILD RAPPORT
2b_rapport_story.description: Share your personal story to build trust
2b_rapport_story.personal_story: [Name], I have to tell you about this. I was spending a fortune on serums and creams — nothing was giving me the glow I wanted. Then I heard about this Lumi patch and thought, really? A patch for beauty? But after a couple weeks, people started commenting. My skin looked healthier, more vibrant. I still do my routine, but Lumi gave me what the products couldn't. [Name], that's why I wanted to share it with you.
talking_points: Open with their name and genuine excitement
Mention the money spent on skincare that didn't deliver
Share the moment people started noticing the difference
Emphasize it complements your existing routine
Close with why you're sharing it with THEM — make it feel personal
2b_rapport_story.transition_to_discovery: So [Name], that's what happened for me. What about you — is there anything about your skin or your look that's been on your mind?

questions.question: What's your biggest frustration when it comes to your skin right now — is there something specific you wish you could change?
What does your ideal skincare result look like — that 'wow, my skin looks amazing' moment?
How much time and money would you say you're spending on skincare products that aren't really delivering the results you want?
Have you noticed your skin changing as you've gotten older — dullness, uneven tone, loss of that natural glow?
How does the way your skin looks affect your confidence, like when you're getting ready in the morning or heading out without makeup?
If you woke up tomorrow with visibly healthier, more radiant skin, how would that change the way you feel about yourself?
Do you ever skip social events or feel self-conscious because of how your skin looks on a given day?
What have you tried so far — serums, facials, supplements, collagen — and what's actually made a noticeable difference?
Have you ever explored an inside-out approach to beauty, where you support your skin from within rather than just applying things on top?
How important is it to you that a beauty solution is natural, drug-free, and works alongside what you're already doing for your skin?

content.problem: You look in the mirror and your skin just doesn't have that glow it used to. You've tried the serums, the creams, the routines — but nothing seems to deliver the results the labels promise. It's frustrating to invest so much time and money into your skin and still feel like something's missing.
content.agitate: And it adds up fast — hundreds of dollars on products that sit half-used in your bathroom drawer. You start feeling self-conscious going out without makeup, noticing every fine line and dull spot more than anyone else does. The signs of aging feel like they're accelerating, and no matter how many layers you apply on the outside, that radiant complexion you're chasing stays just out of reach. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's what makes Lumi different. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — VTT — to support your body's natural beauty from the inside out, promoting a healthier, more radiant complexion at the source. There's nothing to apply, no pills to take, no chemicals — just a drug-free patch that works with your body to bring out that natural glow. Lumi complements your routine by doing what topical products simply can't.

objections.response: I totally get it. Let me ask — how much are you currently spending on skincare? Between serums, facials, collagen supplements, and dermatologist visits, most women spend hundreds a month on their skin. Lumi costs less per day than a single serum and supports radiance from the inside out — something topical products can't do. What would it be worth to simplify your routine and actually see a glow that starts from within?
objections.psychology: Reframe cost against the stacked expense of serums, facials, and skincare subscriptions

objections.response: Absolutely — take your time. Can I ask what's making you hesitate? Is it whether an inside-out approach to beauty actually works, or is it more about adding something new to your routine? Lumi is actually the opposite of 'one more thing' — it simplifies your approach by supporting skin radiance naturally while you go about your day. No extra steps, no creams, no pills. What would help you feel confident about trying it?
objections.psychology: Address skincare fatigue — the overwhelm of too many products — and position Lumi as simplification

objections.response: That makes sense! When you mention it, they'll probably notice the difference before you even explain what it is. Lumi is 100% drug-free and supports your skin's natural radiance from within — no chemicals, no injections, nothing harsh. It's actually a lot safer and simpler than many skincare treatments. What do you think their biggest question would be?
objections.psychology: Frame the conversation around visible results the spouse will see, making them a future advocate

objections.response: I completely understand — the beauty industry is full of products that promise glowing skin and don't deliver. Here's what sets Lumi apart: instead of applying something on top of your skin, it uses Vibrotactile Technology to support your body's natural radiance from the inside out — no chemicals, no collagen pills, no topical treatments. It works with your body, not on it. What would you need to see to feel like it's making a real difference for your skin?
objections.psychology: Validate skepticism from an oversaturated beauty market, then differentiate the inside-out VTT approach from topical products

objections.response: I hear that — most people have a drawer full of serums, creams, and supplements that promised radiant skin but didn't deliver. What frustrated you most about those products? The reason they often fall short is they only work on the surface. Lumi takes a completely different approach — VTT technology supports your skin's appearance from within, complementing whatever you're already doing topically. What was missing from those past skincare solutions?
objections.psychology: Tap into the 'skincare graveyard' frustration and position Lumi as the missing inside-out piece

objections.response: No problem at all. Just curious — is it that you're happy with how your skin looks right now, or is it more that you're skeptical about beauty products in general after being let down before? If it's the latter, I get it — the beauty industry can feel exhausting. Lumi is different because it's not another cream or supplement. It supports radiance from within using drug-free VTT technology. What would a real beauty solution need to look like for you to consider it?
objections.psychology: Separate genuine satisfaction from beauty-product fatigue and cynicism

objections.response: That's actually what makes Lumi so perfect for busy people — there's nothing to apply, no extra steps in your routine, no pills to take with food. You wear the patch and it supports your skin's natural radiance all day while you handle everything else. Think about how much time you'd save if you could simplify your skincare routine and still get better results. How much time does your current routine take every morning?
objections.psychology: Flip the time objection — Lumi replaces steps rather than adding them, appealing to routine simplification

objections.response: Great question — what are you comparing it to? Most beauty products work from the outside in: serums, creams, facials, even injectable treatments. Collagen supplements go internal but require digestion and consistent daily dosing. Lumi uses Vibrotactile Technology to support your skin's radiance from within — nothing goes into your body, no topical application needed. It's the only beauty approach that works with your body's natural neural signals. Have you seen anything else that supports beauty truly from the inside out without any substances?
objections.psychology: Position VTT as a unique inside-out approach that no topical or ingestible product can replicate

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: You're going to love glowing from the inside out — imagine simplifying your whole skincare routine down to this. Let's get Lumi on its way to you. What's the best shipping address?
techniques.when: They're visibly excited about the inside-out beauty concept, already imagining the results

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like the 30-day supply to start seeing that natural glow, or the 90-day pack so you can really simplify your skincare routine and feel confident going out without makeup?
techniques.when: They're interested but deciding on commitment, have talked about wanting to cut down on products or go more natural

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion ending this week — and every day without Lumi is another morning layering on products trying to create a glow that could be happening naturally from within. Let's lock this in and start your glow-up today.
techniques.when: They want radiant skin but keep hesitating, frustrated with their current multi-step routine

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So you want to glow from the inside out, simplify your skincare routine, and feel confident even without makeup — all drug-free with nothing to apply or swallow. That's exactly what Lumi does. Ready to start your glow-up?
techniques.when: Long conversation about skincare frustrations, product overload, and confidence — need to tie it all together

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: You mentioned friends who are really into skincare — they're going to want to know your secret. Who else do you know who'd love to simplify their routine and glow from within? I'd love to help them out too.
techniques.when: After the sale, they're excited about their skin transformation and have mentioned skincare-obsessed friends or beauty-focused circles

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How is your skin looking? Noticing any changes in your complexion or glow? What differences have you seen?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that wants to look and feel more radiant?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
